message:
fix(connector,control_plane,ops): numeric safety, bounded collections, and deduplication

Defensive hardening across several subsystems:

- device_profile/interop_suite: saturating_add for score and counter
  increments to prevent overflow
- saga: advance next_saga_id even on ID collision to prevent permanent
  deadlock on repeated ID generation
- cancel_injection_gate: update cross-wire test to expect all failure
  points rather than indexing [0]
- fork_detection: deduplicate consecutive identical state vectors in
  record_state(), clear history on operator_reset(), use SystemTime::now()
  instead of untrusted remote timestamps
- quarantine_controller: cap batch_actions via push_bounded()
- constraint_compiler/receipt_chain: saturating_add for counters
- revocation_registry: explicit error on at-capacity zone revocation
  instead of silent drop, bound bulk restore insertions
- replay_bundle: switch from read_to_string to BufReader for memory
  efficiency on large bundles

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
